title: SQLite DB contains private keys in plaintext
description: The personas table stores RSA private keys as plaintext PEM in the private_key column. Any process with read access to the SQLite file can extract all private keys. This is a known architectural limitation — encrypting at-rest would require a passphrase or HSM integration. Mitigation: document that broadside.db must be chmod 600 and owned by the service user. Consider file permissions check at startup.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
